title: Lenrose
description: ***.com zoominfo.com/c/lenrose-pty-ltd/551499069 Lenrose & Ace David Jewellery is a premier jewellery manufacturing and casting company based in Melbourne, Australia. They specialize in precious metal casting (gold, platinum, silver, and bronze), CAD services, and the production of hand-made chain products. As a full-service, multi-faceted manufacturing facility, they utilize cutting-edge technology to bring custom jewellery designs to life for their clients
